name: home-route-productization
title: Home route productization or retirement
description: 个人 Home 路由存在 isOwner=true 与成员对话占位，需要并入 tavern home 主线或从产品入口下线。
creator: lijin
notes: Chose retire/merge path: /home/me is now a compatibility page that does not call legacy Home store/chat/message APIs or hardcode owner privileges; it routes owner actions to /create?place_type=home and /owner, hides placeholder member chat/留言 from visitors, and /create now normalizes ?place_type=home through shared place-type helpers. Validation passed: RED/GREEN home-route-productization script, frontend typecheck/test/build, backend compileall, git diff --check.
